title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 21 2025
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Bulker values remain stable this week
Supramax BC Karteria (50,300 DWT, Aug 2001 Kawasaki) sold to unknown Middle Eastern buyers for 7 mil, VV Value USD 6.75 mil
Supramax BC Lorentos (53,700 DWT, May 2005 New Century) sold DD due to undisclosed buyers for 9 mil, VV Value USD 8.24 mil
Handy BC Hongsheng 7 (23,000 DWT, Oct 2011, Hongsheng Shipbuilding) sold DD Passed to undisclosed buyers for USD 6.4 mil, VV Value 6.55 USD mil
Tankers: Older tonnage tanker values firming last week owing to recent sales and an increase in earnings with stability observed for younger tonnage
Aframaxes Amax Avenue & Amax Anthem (116,000 DWT, 2010-2011, Samsung) sold en bloc to undisclosed buyers for USD 79 mil, VV Value USD 77.28 mil
Containers: Container values have remained fairly stable this week, some small increases in Handy and Sub Panamax sizes
No notable sales this week
Image reference: assets/2025-01-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-21-2025_img1_25120250_b17d3b6e776e.jpg
